sentences.arabic: فِي عَصْرِ الثَّوْرَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ، أَصْبَحَ الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ رَكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً لِاسْتِقْرَارِ الْمُؤَسَّسَاتِ وَالدُّوَلِ.
sentences.translation: U eri digitalne revolucije, kibernetička sigurnost postala je osnovni stub stabilnosti institucija i država.
sentences.translationEn: In the era of the digital revolution, cybersecurity has become a fundamental pillar for the stability of institutions and nations.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْمُخْتَرِقُونَ أَسَالِيبَ مُتَطَوِّرَةً لِاخْتِرَاقِ قَوَاعِدِ الْبَيَانَاتِ وَسَرِقَةِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الْحَسَّاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hakeri koriste sofisticirane metode za provaljivanje u baze podataka i krađu osjetljivih informacija.
sentences.translationEn: Hackers use sophisticated methods to breach databases and steal sensitive information.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الشَّرِكَاتِ الِاسْتِثْمَارُ فِي بَرَامِجِ التَّشْفِيرِ الْمُتَقَدِّمَةِ لِحِمَايَةِ أَصُولِهَا مِنَ التَّهْدِيدَاتِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kompanije moraju investirati u napredne softvere za enkripciju kako bi zaštitile svoju imovinu od elektronskih prijetnji.
sentences.translationEn: Companies must invest in advanced encryption software to protect their assets from electronic threats.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَوْعِيَةَ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ بِمَخَاطِرِ الِاحْتِيَالِ الرَّقْمِيِّ تُعَدُّ خُطْوَةً فَعَّالَةً فِي تَقْلِيلِ نِسْبَةِ الِاخْتِرَاقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Podizanje svijesti zaposlenika o rizicima digitalne prevare smatra se efikasnim korakom u smanjenju stope upada u sisteme.
sentences.translationEn: Raising employee awareness about the risks of digital fraud is an effective step in reducing the rate of breaches.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، لَيْسَ الْأَمْنُ الرَّقْمِيُّ مُجَرَّدَ مَسْأَلَةٍ تَقْنِيَّةٍ، بَلْ هُوَ ثَقَافَةٌ شَامِلَةٌ يَنْبَغِي لِلْجَمِيعِ تَبَنِّيهَا.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, digitalna sigurnost nije samo tehničko pitanje, već sveobuhvatna kultura koju svi trebaju usvojiti.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, digital security is not just a technical matter, but a comprehensive culture that everyone should adopt.
